title: Koopman and Vallance victorious in Knysna Waterfront Marathon 10km
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The 10km event at the Knysna...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The 10km event at the Knysna Waterfront Marathon this morning delivered standout  performances.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The 10km event at the Knysna Waterfront Marathon this morning delivered standout performances."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In the men’s race, Austin Koopman of Rainbow AC claimed victory in a time of 32:21.1."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His teammate, Valentino Loggenberg, secured second place in 32:51.1, giving Rainbow AC a powerful one-two finish.","html":"His teammate, Valentino Loggenberg, secured second place in 32:51.1, giving Rainbow AC a powerful one-two finish."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Francios Maquassa of Nedbank Running Club followed in third place with a time of 34:20.7.The women’s 10km race also brought strong results. Jen Vallance took first place in 43:07.7, whilst Mlunguza of Nedbank Running Club, finished second in 44:07.7.","html":"Francios Maquassa of Nedbank Running Club followed in third place with a time of 34:20.7.

The women’s 10km race also brought strong results. Jen Vallance took first place in 43:07.7, whilst Mlunguza of Nedbank Running Club, finished second in 44:07.7."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Belinda Tull of Sedgefield Striders completed the podium, claiming third place in 44:20.3.","html":"Belinda Tull of Sedgefield Striders completed the podium, claiming third place in 44:20.3."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From left is Jen Vallance and Belinda Tull.","html":"From left is Jen Vallance and Belinda Tull."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
